content.text:
You are applying code migration fixes to a single file.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/forklift-console-plugin/source/src/providers/details/tabs/Credentials/components/CredentialsSectionEditMode.tsx

Apply ALL of the following 3 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Lines: 85, 94
Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-button-button-buttonprops-d-ts-button-variant-type-changed]:
Property 'Button.variant' had its type changed (property): Return type of `variant` changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`

File: packages/react-core/src/components/Button/Button.ButtonProps.d.ts
Before: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
After: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: primary

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropTypeChange
Component: Button
Prop: variant
From: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
To: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Code contexts:
```
  (line 85):
   84            <Button
   85              variant={ButtonVariant.primary}
   86              onClick={onUpdate}

  (line 94):
   93          <FlexItem>
   94            <Button variant={ButtonVariant.secondary} onClick={onCancel}>
   95              {t('Cancel')}

```

### Fix 2
Lines: 84, 94
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: FlexItem

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Code contexts:
```
  (line 84):
   83          <FlexItem>
   84            <Button
   85              variant={ButtonVariant.primary}

  (line 94):
   93          <FlexItem>
   94            <Button variant={ButtonVariant.secondary} onClick={onCancel}>
   95              {t('Cancel')}

```

### Fix 3
Lines: 102, 104
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-helpertextitem]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <HelperTextItem> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <HelperTextItem> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <HelperTextItem variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></HelperTextItem>
  After:  <HelperTextItem variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <HelperTextItem> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <HelperTextItem><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</HelperTextItem>
  After:  <HelperTextItem icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</HelperTextItem>

Incident context:
  componentName: HelperTextItem
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: HelperText

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: HelperTextItem
Prop: icon

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Code contexts:
```
  (line 102):
  101          {dataError.type === ValidationState.Error ? (
  102            <HelperTextItem variant="error">{dataError.msg}</HelperTextItem>
  103          ) : (

  (line 104):
  103          ) : (
  104            <HelperTextItem variant="indeterminate">
  105              {t(

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/forklift-console-plugin/source/src/providers/details/tabs/Credentials/components/CredentialsSectionEditMode.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me analyze each fix:

**Fix 1** (Lines 85, 94): `Button.variant` type changed — adds `'stateful'` to the union. Looking at the code, line 85 uses `ButtonVariant.primary` and line 94 uses `ButtonVariant.secondary`. Both `primary` and `secondary` are still valid values in the new type. **No code change needed** — these values remain valid.

**Fix 2** (Lines 84, 94): Icon children to `icon` prop for `<Button>`. Looking at the two Button usages:
- Line 84-91: `<Button variant={ButtonVariant.primary} ...>{t('Update credentials')}</Button>` — contains only text, no icon. **No change needed.**
- Line 94-96: `<Button variant={ButtonVariant.secondary} onClick={onCancel}>{t('Cancel')}</Button>` — contains only text, no icon. **No change needed.**

**Fix 3** (Lines 102, 104): Icon children to `icon` prop for `<HelperTextItem>`. Looking at the two HelperTextItem usages:
- Line 102: `<HelperTextItem variant="error">{dataError.msg}</HelperTextItem>` — contains only `{dataError.msg}`, no icon. **No change needed.**
- Line 104-108: `<HelperTextItem variant="indeterminate">{t(...)}</HelperTextItem>` — contains only translated text, no icon. **No change needed.**

All three fixes target code that doesn't actually need changes — the values used are still valid, and there are no icons as children in any of the flagged components.

## Changes Applied

1. **Fix 1** (Button.variant type changed): **No change needed** — Both `ButtonVariant.primary` (line 85) and `ButtonVariant.secondary` (line 94) remain valid values in the updated type union. The only change was the addition of `'stateful'` as a new option.

2. **Fix 2** (Button icon children to prop): **No change needed** — Neither Button instance contains icon children. Line 84-91 has text children `{t('Update credentials')}` and line 94-96 has text children `{t('Cancel')}`. No icons to migrate.

3. **Fix 3** (HelperTextItem icon children to prop): **No change needed** — Neither HelperTextItem instance contains icon children. Line 102 has `{dataError.msg}` and line 104-108 has `{t(...)}` translated text. No icons to migrate.
